description: One percenter outlaw motorcycle club based in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, founded in 1949 by returning WWII veterans. Originally a family-oriented club, it became a violent gang under John 'Satan' Marron, who later became National President of the Pagan's Motorcycle Club. The club is a brother club to the Pagans and wears a diamond 'P' patch to signify allegiance. Its clubhouse was destroyed by a pipe bomb in 2002, suspected to be by Hells Angels.
